cases.name: handoff-trigger-explicit
expect: Runs scripts/discover-repos.sh and reconciles against relay.toml
Pre-scans the two repos read-only, then asks ALL clarifying questions in one AskUserQuestion batch (including a wip-snapshot offer for any dirty repo)
Spawns one child per repo in its own worktree under ~/.cache/fables-turn/worktrees/
Does not push from children; orchestrator merges --no-ff, tags fable-ckpt-*, pushes once per repo

cases.name: handoff-all-is-waved
expect: Treats --all as confirmed OWN repos by neediness in waves of at most 5, not all repos at once
needs_review repos (e.g. applicationManager, esp-agents-firmware) are excluded unless the user explicitly opts in
State persisted to ~/.config/fables-turn/relay.toml so the run resumes next turn

cases.name: review-anti-gaming
expect: Diffs all commits since the last fable-ckpt-* tag, not only executor commits
Flags deleted tests, weakened asserts, added skip/xfail/.only, and hardcoded expected values
Runs the original pre-checkpoint version of modified formerly-red tests against the new implementation (resurrection check)
Re-derives ROADMAP.md and updates the TODO.md summary line

cases.name: quota-ordering
expect: Orders work docs -> red tests -> BDD -> HARD, committing at each checkpoint
Defaults HARD execution (C5) off in the expensive pricing window unless the user overrides
On cutoff, finishes merge debt for completed children and records HANDBACK notes rather than abandoning unmerged worktrees

cases.name: no-accidental-trigger
cases.prompt: Can you review my pull request for bugs?
expect: Does NOT invoke relay — this is an ordinary code-review request, not a relay turn
